home_hero_subtext: Open-run soccer in Scarborough, every Wednesday night. 18+, free, and all about the game. Lace up, show up, and play.
run_hero_subtext: Open-run soccer for ballers 18 and up. Every Wednesday at Metrogolf Sportsplex. No fees, no commitment. Bring your boots, link up with your city, and play.
run_first_note: Our first run · more Wednesdays all summer
